a_image.alt: File Folder UI style mood board — Skeuomorphic · Office

sections.a_description: A tabbed manila file folder with a typed label, slightly dog-eared edges, and the institutional warmth of a well-organized filing cabinet — File Folder UI turns the screen into a familiar office artifact. The protruding tab, the tan cardstock color, and the clean typed labels create a skeuomorphic experience that's immediately recognizable to anyone who's ever flipped through a filing drawer.

File Folder styling appears on document management systems, legal firm platforms, and administrative tool interfaces. You'll find it on project management apps, case file databases, medical record systems, and any application where the familiar metaphor of physical file organization helps users feel oriented in a sea of digital information.

a_image_cover.alt: File Folder UI style use case illustration
File Folder UI style use case illustration
File Folder UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: A physical manila file folder — the tabbed, institutional aesthetic of an office filing cabinet. Background: medium gray (#b8b0a8) simulating a desk surface. The .inner panel is the file folder itself: manila/tan (#e8d8b8) background with a tab at the top — a wider rectangle protruding above the card's top edge, created via a pseudo-element (same manila color, smaller width, positioned above). The folder has a subtle crease line and a slightly raised edge (1px border in a darker tan). The tab has a slightly darker background to suggest a label area. Typography is clean and institutional — like typed labels on folder tabs. Set in Inter — neutral, professional, and perfectly channeling the Courier/Helvetica office aesthetic without being stuffy. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.2, color #3e3420 (warm dark brown). Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #8b7355 (warm label brown). Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #4a3f30. Buttons: primary — warm brown (#6b5540), cream text, 4px radius. Secondary: transparent, brown border. Alternatives: IBM Plex Sans, Roboto, DM Sans.
